title: Quarterly Closeout
instruction: End-of-quarter cleanup. In your Primary tab: star the two most important emails (the ones mentioning 'board presentation' and 'renewal deadline'), and archive the three old FYI emails from Maya Rivera. In your Promotions tab: archive the three newsletters and delete the spam email about 'Exclusive prize giveaway'. In your Updates tab: forward the two update emails about 'infrastructure migration' to team-digest@company.test. Create two labels: 'Q1 Active' and 'Q1 Archive'. Apply 'Q1 Active' to the two starred emails. Go to Contacts, delete the two contacts that have not been in touch for more than 30 days. Update the note for Sofia Chen to 'Key contact for Q2 planning.'. Go to Settings > Filters and create a filter that archives emails from acmevendor.test and labels them 'Vendor Invoices'. Change the maximum page size to 25.

emails.subject: Upcoming renewal deadline for enterprise license
emails.body:
Reminder: the enterprise license renewal deadline is next Friday.

We need to confirm the renewal terms and budget allocation.

Thanks,
Contracts

emails.subject: Preparation for the board presentation
emails.body:
We need to finalize the board presentation materials before Thursday.

Please review the attached deck and send your comments by end of day.

Thanks,
Leadership

emails.subject: Exclusive prize giveaway
emails.body:
Congratulations! You have been selected for an exclusive prize giveaway!

Click below to claim your reward. Offer expires in 24 hours.

emails.subject: Quarterly metrics recap
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Avery
